title: MC Backrooms - Found Footage
description: a modpack for the Minecraft Backrooms Found Footage mod by SpacePotato - with optimizations!
body:
<center>

<sup>a modpack for the [Minecraft Backrooms Found Footage](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-found-footage) mod by [SpacePotato](https://flicker-knot-00b.notion.site/I-Turned-Minecraft-Into-a-Found-Footage-Video-1a31d31c0feb807a8ab2fe7ed6191ad7)!</sup>  
**updated for 1.1.7**

</center>

## 🚪 to enter the backrooms
1. create a new world
2. be in survival mode
3. suffocate yourself with sand or gravel

## 🎮 host a Singleplayer world for friends
> **note:** best if the host has the most stable/fastest internet connection

<details><summary>✅ Essential Mod (recommended)</summary>

> if you know how **Essential Mod** works, just host your world as you normally would!

---

### 👥 add your friends in Essential
1. click <kbd>Social 👥</kbd> button
2. click the blue <kbd>👤+</kbd>Add Friend icon
3. enter their Minecraft username, click <kbd>Add</kbd>

---

### 🌐 invite friends (in world)
1. open Esc menu
2. click <kbd>Invite ✉️</kbd> button
3. choose friends to invite!

### 🌐 or from the main menu
1. click <kbd>Host World 🌎</kbd>
2. select the world you want
3. choose friends to invite and host

</details>

<details><summary>⚠️ e4mc (with workaround)</summary>

> **e4mc** requires a bit of a workaround for the Simple Voice Chat mod to work properly!

---

### 🌐 hosting your world
1. open Esc menu
2. click <kbd>Open to LAN</kbd> button
3. click <kbd>Start LAN World</kbd> button
4. **share the link**  
   - you will see a message in chat
   - click the link to **copy** it
   - send it to your friends! they can join via **Multiplayer**
   - **Direct Connection** is recommended *(domains change each session)*

---

### 🗣️ Simple Voice Chat workaround
- watch this short video tutorial: https://youtu.be/TOE6dbtrZWg
- or check this guide here: https://sora.framer.wiki/

</details>

## 💡 things
- this modpack is **incompatible** with **Mac OS**
- **integrated graphics** are not currently supported
- do not use **Fabulous!** graphics, only **Fast** or **Fancy**
- do not remove **veil/deferred** resource pack
- you can **configure the shaders and video/camera settings** for the Found Footage mod from **ModMenu** *(if you get motion sickness for example)*

<details><summary>mods information</summary>

> this modpack aims to provide a stable and optimized base for you to customize. feel free to add your own mods or see the **addon mod recommendations** below for inspiration

---

### ⚙️ stuff
- removed [C2ME](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) because it crashes the game when entering new levels  
  *(crashed on entering Level 1 in 1.1.7)*
- mods like [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium), [VulkanMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod), [Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/home), [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris), are **incompatible**
- *for more information about the Found Footage mod, check their [official wiki](https://github.com/SpacePotatoee/MinecraftFoundFootage/wiki)*

---

### 📌 included mods (21+1)
- [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations): low-impact miscellaneous optimizations
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config): dependency for MoreCulling mod
- [Cubes Without Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/cubes-without-borders): allows you to play in borderless fullscreen window
- [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe): reimplements block (tile) entities for performance
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling): uses path tracing to cull entities behind walls
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api): essential hooks and interoperability mechanisms for Fabric mods
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core): memory usage optimizations
- [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib): dependency for Minecraft Backrooms Found Footage mod
- [GpuTape](https://modrinth.com/mod/gputape): fix video memory leaks, based on [VideoTape](https://modrinth.com/mod/videotape) 
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast): immediate-mode rendering optimizations across many areas
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton): attempts to optimize the Minecraft networking stack
- [Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix): fixes multiple memory leaks in Minecraft
- [Minecraft Backrooms Found Footage](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-found-footage): the backrooms mod
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix): miscellaneous optimizations targeting load times and memory usage
- [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu): lets you easily view and configure the mods you have installed
- [MoreCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling): various culling-related optimizations
- [Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium): low-impact worldgen optimizations
- [ServerCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/servercore): aims to optimize the Minecraft server
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat): proximity voice chat for Minecraft with a variety of addons
- [ThreadTweak](https://modrinth.com/mod/threadtweak): adjusts thread priorities for performance
- [Very Many Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric): like Lithium, but smaller and more experimental
### +
- [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc): reverse tunneling reverse proxy for Minecraft
- [Essential Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential): world hosting, friend chat, avatar customizations, and much more

---

### 🔎 addon mod recommendations
- [Better Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-third-person): improves third person camera view
- [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling): adds a search bar to the key bindings menu
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps): reduce resource use when backgrounded, idle, or battery-powered
- [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation): adds sprite animations for edible and drinkable items
- [FastBack](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastback): fast, incremental world backups powered by Git
- [First-person Model](https://modrinth.com/mod/first-person-model): enables the third-person model in first-person
- [InvMove](https://modrinth.com/mod/invmove): adds the ability to walk around while in inventories
- [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix): fixes gaps in block models and item models
- [No Hunger](https://modrinth.com/mod/nohunger): removes hunger and replaces eating to heal you instead  
  *(works well with the mod since it has its own stamina thingy)*
- [Ping Wheel](https://modrinth.com/mod/ping-wheel): allows players to temporarily mark locations and entities
- [ResolutionControl+](https://modrinth.com/mod/resolution-control-plus): allows you to set render resolutions and take large screenshots  
  *(great for making the game look lower res like lethal company or repo)*
- [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered): adds realistic sound attenuation, reverberation, and absorption through blocks
</details>

<details><summary>optional java arguments</summary>

> 🚀 **recommended for:**  
> OpenJDK builds shipped with Shenandoah, such as [Adoptium Temurin (AdoptOpenJDK)](https://adoptium.net/)

```
-Xms#G -Xmx#G -XX:+UnlockExperimentalVMOptions -XX:+UseShenandoahGC -XX:+AlwaysPreTouch -XX:+DisableExplicitGC
```

> ^ replace '#' with the amount of RAM you want to allocate, e.g. `-Xms4G -Xmx4G` for 4GB

---

### 📌 sources
- [The Useful Lists - Java Arguments Optimization](https://github.com/TheUsefulLists/UsefulMods/blob/main/JavaArgumentsOptimization.md)
- [DragonEggBedrockBreaking - zgc and friends](https://gist.github.com/DragonEggBedrockBreaking/e53a906978d23f3bdd614d2104bf4540)
- [u/mindcloud69's Reddit post](https://www.reddit.com/r/feedthebeast/s/a7hijwlxTv)
- [TerraFirmaCraft Plus Wiki](https://plus.terrafirmacraft.com/Performance_Optimization)
- [OpenJDK Wiki - Shenandoah](https://wiki.openjdk.org/display/shenandoah/Main#Main-JDKSupport)

</details>

## 🎉 credits
- [SpacePotato](https://modrinth.com/user/SpacePotato) and [Herr_Chaos](https://modrinth.com/user/Herr_Chaos) for the amazing mod 💖  
- [HyperSoop](https://modrinth.com/user/HyperSoop) for testing and configuring [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) (rip) 🗿
- modpack icon is made with images from the Minecraft Found Footage [GitHub repo](https://github.com/SpacePotatoee/MinecraftFoundFootage/), and thumbnail of [SpacePotato's video](https://youtu.be/XnO1GAlR3qo) on YouTube

## ℹ️ disclaimer
this modpack bundles third‑party mods hosted on Modrinth. all included mods remain the intellectual property of their respective authors and are used under their original licenses.
